evals.prompt: Help me integrate @notifi-network/notifi-react into my React app. I already have Aptos wallet connectivity, and I want the smallest working NotifiCardModal setup first.
evals.expected_output: REQUIRED: Choose NotifiCardModal path. REQUIRED: Wire NotifiContextProvider near the existing wallet/layout boundary (not wrapping entire app). REQUIRED: Reuse existing Aptos wallet state for on-chain auth, adapting the current signMessage from the wallet adapter. REQUIRED: Include tenantId, cardId, env as props (flag missing values as placeholders with TODO comments — do NOT quietly hardcode fake values). PREFERRED: Place NotifiCardModal trigger in an existing header/nav entry surface over a disconnected demo button. PREFERRED: Open-close-reopen modal cycle works correctly after the card is wrapped. FORBIDDEN: Creating an isolated demo wrapper or restructure the app. FORBIDDEN: Using custom context integration when NotifiCardModal is sufficient.

evals.prompt: I do not want NotifiCardModal. Help me build a custom notification preferences panel with notifi-react contexts. It should at least support login, topic display, and target toggling.
evals.expected_output: REQUIRED: Choose the custom context integration path (not NotifiCardModal). REQUIRED: Use NotifiAuthContext for login state. REQUIRED: Use NotifiTopicContext for topic display and subscription toggling. REQUIRED: Use NotifiTargetContext for target (channel) management. REQUIRED: Provide working code skeleton with correct hook usage for all 3 concerns (auth, topics, targets). FORBIDDEN: Use or suggest NotifiCardModal. FORBIDDEN: Suggest SmartLink as an alternative.

evals.prompt: I am using Google OIDC login, not a blockchain wallet. Help me integrate NotifiContextProvider with the off-chain auth path.
evals.expected_output: REQUIRED: Choose OFF_CHAIN auth mode. REQUIRED: Ask for or reuse a stable user identifier (email, sub, or similar OIDC claim). REQUIRED: Use signIn flow compatible with off-chain auth (no wallet signing). REQUIRED: NotifiContextProvider configured with userIdentifier, not walletBlockchain/walletPublicKey. FORBIDDEN: Request wallet-based signing or assume a crypto wallet is available. FORBIDDEN: Suggest ON_CHAIN auth as a fallback.

evals.prompt: I want to embed a Notifi SmartLink action button in my custom React component. I just need the simplest working setup — trigger a notification action when a user clicks a button in my app.
evals.expected_output: REQUIRED: Choose the NotifiSmartLink integration path. REQUIRED: Wire NotifiContextProvider in the app component tree if not already present. REQUIRED: Import and use NotifiSmartLink component or hook for the action button. REQUIRED: Configure the SmartLink with correct id and type params. REQUIRED: Flag any missing runtime values (tenantId, smartLinkId) as placeholders with TODO comments. FORBIDDEN: Suggest NotifiCardModal as a replacement for SmartLink. FORBIDDEN: Create a demo app wrapper instead of integrating into the existing app structure.

evals.prompt: I installed @notifi-network/notifi-react and added NotifiContextProvider, but my NotifiCardModal is not rendering at all — the screen is just blank where the card should be. The console shows no errors. What should I check?
evals.expected_output: REQUIRED: Triage in the order specified in SKILL Troubleshooting Priorities. REQUIRED: Check that NotifiContextProvider is placed inside the wallet/auth provider (not outside). REQUIRED: Check that tenantId and cardId are correct and not undefined. REQUIRED: Check env matches the card's deployment environment. REQUIRED: Check that the modal container has non-zero dimensions (CSS issue). REQUIRED: Suggest checking the browser console for 404s or CORS errors on the Notifi API endpoint. REQUIRED: Provide specific diagnostic steps, not generic debugging advice. FORBIDDEN: Jump to custom context integration as a troubleshooting step.

evals.prompt: I'm setting up NotifiContextProvider in my Next.js app but I don't know my tenantId or cardId yet — only that I'm on the Production environment. Can you help me wire up the provider so it's ready when I get those values? I use MetaMask for wallet connectivity.
evals.expected_output: REQUIRED: Provide the full NotifiContextProvider setup with tenantId, cardId, and env. REQUIRED: Mark tenantId and cardId as explicit placeholders (e.g., 'TODO: Replace with your tenantId from Notifi Admin Portal'). REQUIRED: Use ON_CHAIN auth with Ethereum/MetaMask wallet. REQUIRED: Adapt wallet state from window.ethereum, ethers, or web3-react for signMessage. REQUIRED: Explain WHERE the user can find tenantId and cardId (Notifi Admin Portal). FORBIDDEN: Hardcode fake tenantId/cardId values without TODO flags. FORBIDDEN: Skip the provider setup until the user provides values.

evals.prompt: I want a full-page Notifi app, not just a component integration. Start from the Notifi dapp example on GitHub and customize the pulled app for me. I have not provided tenantId or cardId yet, and I have not chosen the chain group or wallets to support.
evals.expected_output: REQUIRED: Choose the full-page app from Notifi dapp example path. REQUIRED: Use the GitHub notifi-sdk-ts repo's packages/notifi-dapp-example as the baseline. REQUIRED: Work against a pulled or prepared copy of the example app, not the SDK source package in place. REQUIRED: Do NOT write any code on the first response. Collect all required config values before generating any files. REQUIRED: Follow the canonical question order: 1) confirm integration path, 2) ask for tenantId, 3) ask for cardId, 4) confirm env (default Production), 5) ask for chain group, 6) ask for wallets per chain group, 7) confirm auth mode. REQUIRED: Ask for tenantId and cardId BEFORE writing any code. Do not silently hardcode fake values. PREFERRED: When the user has not provided any config values, explain the information you need and the order in which you will ask before jumping into specific questions. REQUIRED: Ask for chain group BEFORE asking for wallets. Asking wallets before chain group is a FAIL behavior. This rule applies regardless of any wallet names the user mentions. REQUIRED: If the user states a chain group explicitly, accept it and proceed to wallet selection for that group. Do not offer wallets from other chain groups once the chain group is confirmed. FORBIDDEN: Infer the chain group from a wallet name. MetaMask does not imply EVM. Phantom does not imply Solana. REQUIRED: If the user provides some config values upfront, acknowledge each one and continue the canonical order from the first missing value. Do not re-ask for values the user has already provided. REQUIRED: Default env to Production unless the user explicitly requests a different environment. Only env has a safe default. FORBIDDEN: Default, suggest, or assume any specific chain group or wallet when the user has not indicated a preference. PREFERRED: Treat this as an app-generation workflow first; do not force a concrete in-app Notifi UI surface decision before the missing runtime values are clarified unless the user explicitly asks for one. FORBIDDEN: Quietly hardcode fake tenantId/cardId values. FORBIDDEN: Guess wallets before the chain group is known. FORBIDDEN: Offer chain choices outside the notifi-wallet-provider-supported chain groups for this path. FORBIDDEN: Only provide snippets or advice without operating on the prepared app. FORBIDDEN: Modify packages/notifi-dapp-example directly inside the SDK repo source tree.
